allow: PowerShell([Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12; foreach \($v in @\("16.11","16.10","16.9","16.8"\)\) { $url = "https://get.enterprisedb.com/postgresql/postgresql-$v-1-windows-x64.exe"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Method Head $url -TimeoutSec 20 -ErrorAction Stop; "ENCONTRADO: $v \($\([Math]::Round\($r.Headers.'Content-Length'/1MB\)\) MB\) -> $url"; break } catch { "no: $v" } })
